creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 225414
Patch to update audio/grip to 4.2.1

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update audio/grip to 4.2.1.

Changelog
=========

- Use gnudb.org as default cd database, as it is replacing Freedb
- Translation updates: french, serbian, italian
- Update documentation, IRC moving from Freenode to Libera

Kind regards,

Jens
